solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on gold-specific implementation details: exact function names 'Write-PREntry' and 'Get-ReadyToReviewPRNumbers' (test_script_new_functions_and_fields), exact variable name '$defaultPRs' (test_script_default_category_logic), exact regex patterns for 'Assignees\s*=' in PSCustomObject blocks. An alternative correct implementation using different function/variable names (e.g., 'Format-PROutput', '$combinedPRs') would fail these tests despite being functionally equivalent.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Every test reads file content and uses regex/string matching: e.g., test_script_param_defaults uses regex on file text, test_script_validate_set_has_new_categories uses regex on file text, test_script_new_functions_and_fields checks string presence. No test actually executes the PowerShell script or calls any function. All tests are essentially 'assert pattern in open(path).read()' style checks.
